dateline: Tampa, Florida — SWIM Tops Billboard Global 200 for 4th Consecutive Week; North America Tour Opener Three Days Away
heroHeadline: 'SWIM' Leads Billboard Global 200 Four Weeks Running as BTS Prepares Tampa Tour Opener
heroSubtitle: 4,696 days since debut: BTS's 'SWIM' topped the Billboard Global 200 for a fourth consecutive week (April 22). ARIRANG holds #3 on the Billboard 200 in week 4 — the best fourth-week chart position in K-pop history. BTS opens the North American leg of the ARIRANG World Tour at Raymond James Stadium, Tampa, FL on April 25 (3 sold-out nights, ~195,000 fans). HYBE Chairman Bang Si-hyuk's arrest warrant remains pending before Seoul courts following police application on April 21.
footerNote: Data sourced from HYBE, Billboard, Hanteo Chart, Gaon Chart, Melon, Spotify, Netflix, Guinness World Records, IFPI, Korea Times, Korea Herald, Yonhap, Bloomberg, Variety, AP News, UPI, Starnews Korea, Rolling Stone, PBS NewsHour, Euronews, City of Tampa, Business Observer Florida, and Recording Academy.
